section.heading: Press
section.body: Dr. Vasquez has been the subject of published coverage in IEEE Spectrum, the flagship periodical of the Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE). IEEE is the world's largest professional technical organization, with a membership spanning more than 160 countries, and IEEE Spectrum serves as its primary publication for communicating significant advances in electrical engineering, computing, and related technologies to a global professional audience of engineers, researchers, and technologists. Editorial coverage in IEEE Spectrum is not solicited by researchers; it reflects an independent determination by experienced technical journalists and editors that a subject's work merits attention from a sophisticated, field-leading readership. That Dr. Vasquez's research attracted this editorial interest demonstrates that her contributions have been recognized not only within the specialist peer-review community — as addressed in the Scholarly Articles and Original Contribution sections above — but also as broadly noteworthy developments within the larger technical profession. Publication by IEEE Spectrum accordingly constitutes published material in a major trade or professional media outlet about Dr. Vasquez and her work in the field, consistent with the evidentiary standard for this criterion.

disclaimer: This is general informational guidance only, not legal advice. Immigration law is fact-specific and changes frequently. An attorney of record licensed to practice law is required to review your petition and advise on your situation before anything is filed with USCIS.
